title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Boehringer Ingelheim India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!
